## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->

This pull request updates the handling of edge cases for rain and cloud particle distribution parameter calculations in `src/Microphysics2M.jl`. The main focus is on improving numerical stability and ensuring the functions return sensible outputs when input values are near zero.

Improvements to edge case handling:

* In `pdf_rain_parameters` for `RainParticlePDF_SB2006_limited`, the early return condition now checks if either `Nᵣ` or `qᵣ` is below machine epsilon, rather than strictly zero, to better handle very small values and avoid numerical issues.
* In `log_pdf_cloud_parameters_mass`, the function now checks if either `N` or the mass `L` is below machine epsilon and returns appropriate log values for these cases, improving robustness for near-zero inputs.
title: fix(2M): refine limiting behavior for cloud & rain distribution parameters
